prestazioni: BMW N63B44O2 (4.4L twin-turbo V8) hybrid turbo upgrade: Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, 1.05 A/R turbine housings, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates to target 850whp on E85 with a custom Motec M150 ECU calibration by Dyno Dynamics UK

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič with 3.5" center sections, quad 4.5" carbon-fiber tips, and a valved X-pipe bypass for backpressure optimization, paired with a custom heat-wrapped titanium downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter for Euro 6 compliance

Ohlins TTX46 coilovers with 2-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 12-position ride height adjustability, and bespoke spring rates (14kg/mm front, 18kg/mm rear) developed in collaboration with Morgan’s chassis engineers, plus spherical bearing top mounts by SuperPro for subframe rigidity
estetica: Custom carbon-fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB Works) adapted for the Aero GT’s aluminum chassis, featuring bolt-on overfenders with integrated LED turn signals and a 50mm rear track width increase, finished in a matte ‘Morgan Racing Green’ with exposed carbon weave accents

Full carbon-fiber front splitter by Vorsteiner with integrated air curtains and a 3D-printed ABS undertray to manage airflow to the N63’s intercoolers, paired with a fixed carbon rear wing by APR Performance (model GT-250) mounted on CNC-machined aluminum pedestals for 150kg of downforce at 160mph

Bespoke interior by Sabelt featuring carbon-fiber Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point harness cutouts, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum shift knob by CAE Shifters with a 3D-engraved Morgan ‘Final Edition’ plaque, all wrapped in Nappa leather with contrast stitching in ‘British Racing Green’
